prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 13016→13780→11281→28090→19583。2024 年因考试模式从文理分科改为'3+1+2'新高考，批次合并导致位次大幅后移至 28090；2025 年恢复至 19583，较 2023 年仍后移约 8300 名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025 年基准约 19583 名；该校在云南省理科/物理类计划数：2021 年 107 人、2022 年 118 人、2023 年 118 人、2024 年 124 人、2025 年 129 人；2026 年计划 118 人，较 2025 年减少 11 人（缩招约 8.5%），缩招通常使竞争略有缓解，位次数字减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年第 74 名（2021 年第 78→2022 年第 75→2023 年第 69→2024 年第 71→2025 年第 73），近年排名稳定在 70–80 区间，属中上水平综合类大学；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面，主要涉及学校管理回应、男子排球队夺冠等正面事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第 43，综合热度 96.6 万），短视频曝光度处于中上水平，反映报考关注度有所升温。历史投档异常方面，2023 年曾出现偏负面评价，但近年已无明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程为 A+（唯一 A- 及以上学科），与该校食品科学与工程类、食品营养与健康等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度偏热。本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年（物理类 17.33 万+历史类 11.24 万≈28.57 万）明显增加，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 22.93 万，增长约 32%，竞争显著加剧。2026 年；南昌大学位于江西省（非本省），在云南省招生规模中等（理科/物理类约 118–129 人），无显著地域偏好优势；江西省与云南省同属中西部地区，跨省报考无明显地域溢价或折价。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招（约 8.5%）、本省物理类考生大幅增加（约 32%）以及声誉热度偏正面等多重因素：考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应显著超过缩招的缓解效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 19583 名基础上继续前移（位次数字减小），但受缩招制约前移幅度有限。预测最低位次约 18781 名，区间 18281–19281 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 13016→13780→11281→28090→19583. In 2024, due to the change in exam mode from arts-science division to the new '3+1+2' college entrance exam, batch merging caused a significant drop in ranking to 28090; in 2025, it recovered to 19583, still about 8300 places behind 2023, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 19583; the university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Yunnan Province: 107 in 2021, 118 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 124 in 2024, 129 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 118, a decrease of 11 from 2025 (a reduction of about 8.5%), which usually slightly eases competition and reduces the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 74th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (78th in 2021→75th in 2022→69th in 2023→71st in 2024→73rd in 2025), with stable rankings in the 70–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly involving positive events such as university management responses and the men's volleyball team winning the championship; Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 43rd overall, with a comprehensive popularity of 966,000), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting a rise in application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there were somewhat negative evaluations in 2023, but no obvious signal of ranking gaps in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A+ (the only A- or above discipline), directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Nutrition and Health, which has a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity, and they highly overlap with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors; medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are also relatively popular. The total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025 (Physics Category 173,300 + History Category 112,400 ≈ 285,700), with an estimated Physics Category candidates of about 229,300 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 32%, significantly intensifying competition. In 2026; Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province (not this province), with a medium enrollment scale in Yunnan Province (Science/Physics Category about 118–129), without significant regional preference advantages; both Jiangxi and Yunnan belong to the central and western regions, with no obvious regional premium or discount for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuating downward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (about 8.5%), the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in this province (about 32%), and the slightly positive reputation and popularity: the competition intensification effect caused by the surge in candidate numbers significantly exceeds the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward (ranking number decreases) based on the 2025 baseline of 19583, but the extent of the forward movement is limited by the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18781, with a range of 18281–19281.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18281–19281, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (such as Automation, Electronic Information, Software Engineering, Food Science and Engineering), use Tier 1 majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, Environment, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<18281), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>19281), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2371→2268→2627→3524→3982, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1355 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3982; the university's planned enrollment in Yunnan Province for liberal arts/history category: 23 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 23, a decrease of 3 from 2025 (a reduction of about 11.5%), which usually slightly eases competition and reduces the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 74th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, stable in the 70–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly involving positive events such as school management response and the men's volleyball team winning the championship; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 43rd overall), with medium-high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there were negative evaluations in 2023, but no obvious signal of gaps in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering is A+, but it belongs to the science and engineering direction; liberal arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, History, Accounting, Journalism, etc.) have no A- or above discipline evaluation, and the overall liberal arts strength is moderate.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese major is socially popular and recommended, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Accounting/Finance/Audit is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, with an estimated history category examinees of about 148,600 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (112,400), significantly intensifying competition. In 2026; Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province (not the home province), with a small enrollment scale in Yunnan Province for liberal arts/history category (about 23–28 people), with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 11.5% in 2026, the significant increase of about 32% in history category examinees in the province, and the slightly positive reputation and popularity: the competition intensification effect caused by the surge in examinees significantly exceeds the mitigation effect of enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward (ranking number decreases) based on the 2025 baseline of 3982, but the forward shift is limited due to enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3786, with a range of 3286–4286.
